75479.subject: The Daily Degen - July 4th, 2026
75479.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-july-4th-2026

Happy Saturday good degens! And Happy 4th of July!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.245T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $712.60
Gold: $4,174.10
Silver: $59.62
Oil (WTI): $68.78
US 10Y Treasury: 4.485%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 27
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Huge news from @maplefinance [ https://substack.com/redirect/2248d982-1c89-4893-bdf7-535fa9b93bb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] friends!
They are now live on Robinhood Chain - and have introduced a new yield-bearing asset called $USDG! 
As stated in their announcement tweet:
“Maple is expanding into the Robinhood ecosystem, with syrupUSDG and syrupUSDC now live on Robinhood Chain.
Steakhouse approved Maple’s syrupUSDG as collateral for the vault used in Robinhood Earn, the first decentralized lending product available within the Robinhood app.”
This is a MASSIVELY bullish announcement for Maple- as it means their yield will be directly available to Robinhood’s 22M active users! (see tweet on it from Maple co-founder @syrupsid below!)
And this is just the latest bullish announcement from the Maple team, who have been stacking huge wins of late despite the broader bear market!
Learn more about everything Maple is doing on the upcoming Investor Call on July 8th! (click here [ https://substack.com/redirect/08fee8a4-7bd2-4156-8287-a2ec52973bb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] to put it on your schedule and submit any questions you have!)
And as always make sure to follow Maple on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/2248d982-1c89-4893-bdf7-535fa9b93bb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates, and stay tuned as we continue bringing attention to everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. 19 of the top 25 chains are green on the weekly. 
Protocols are also mixed today. 13 of the top 25 protocols are green on the weekly. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Dex’s By 7 Day Volume (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project

75478.subject:
Action required: your billing account 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD is past
 due or has invalid payment information.
75478.body:
Google Cloud Platform Go to my console »





Action required


Dear Google customer,


You are receiving this email because you are a Google Cloud Platform,  
Firebase, or API customer.


Our records indicate that your billing account: 01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD is  
past due or does not have valid payment information associated with it.  
This may happen if your credit card has expired or was cancelled, and we  
haven't received valid payment information from you.

Please update your billing account with valid payment information by  
following this link:

https://console.cloud.google.com/billing/01FB74-1CEEDC-1297AD/settings


Failure to make payments may result in suspension and/or termination of  
your billing account and the related Project(s) or Service(s). Note that  
some services might already be impacted. If you have already updated your  
payment information, please disregard this message.

If you have any questions please contact us using this form:  
https://support.google.com/code/contact/cloud_platform_billing







The Google team





Google Plus Twitter Blogger



© 2026 Google LLC, 1600 Amphitheatre Parkway, Mountain View, CA 94043

You have received this mandatory service announcement to update you about  
important changes to Google Cloud Platform, Firebase, APIs, or to your  
account.
